diagrams.title: Management Control Process Cycle
diagrams.description: Shows the continuous cycle of management control from setting standards to corrective action
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how management control works as an ongoing process

diagrams.title: Responsibility Center Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing different responsibility centers from lowest to highest authority
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing levels of authority and accountability in organizations

diagrams.title: Balanced Scorecard Four Perspectives
diagrams.description: Four interconnected quadrants showing strategic performance measurement areas
diagrams.purpose: Understanding strategic alignment and cause-effect relationships in performance measurement

diagrams.title: Variance Analysis Framework
diagrams.description: Framework showing how variances are calculated and categorized
diagrams.purpose: Learning how to analyze cost differences and take management actions

diagrams.title: Types of Budgets
diagrams.description: Classification of different budget types used in organizations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding various budgeting techniques for planning and control

visuals.title: Management And Management Control
visuals.description: Visual diagram for management and management control
